name: an ambiguous config/markup rule (yaml/json) with no specific path governs both development paths
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-path.sh" --rule-id g-yaml-well-formed --applies-to '{"linguist_aliases":["yaml"]}' 2>e.txt; grep -q 'development_paths=fullstack,iac' e.txt && echo ambiguous-config-both 1>&2
